creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Free paper cup to paint with every order! 🥰🎨☕️

📍 @sketchartcafe 
☕️ We had Sea Salt Latte and Strawberry Matcha for AED 39 each.
🧑‍🎨 Other arts and crafts like coloring pads and design-your-own pouch are available.

As I want to do a Halloween activity, but too busy to arrange a party and too tired to have a ghost-trend reel, we made Halloween coffee cups instead! 🎃👻 These cups would also be nice for our Pumpkin Spiced Lattes, don’t you think? 🥰

You can take home your cup or display it on the cafe gallery! 

Tag your besties!

Sketch Art Cafe • Dubai Cafe • Arts and Craft in Dubai • Lady and her Sweet Escapes

transcription.text: This that pretty girl mancha, this that flancha, just touched down in L.A. Pretty girls don't do drama, less we wanna, it'll be depending on the day. Pretty girls lookin' to defend, I know I'm a defender, never let it catch no stray. This that pretty girl-
